Our Services

Everything You Need to Explore Dharamshala

Whether you need a taxi for sightseeing, a scooty for solo exploration, or a night pickup from the airport — we have you covered.

Local Taxi Service

Comfortable taxi rides across Dharamshala, McLeod Ganj, Bhagsu, Naddi, Dharamkot, and all nearby attractions.

Starting ₹300

  • AC & non-AC vehicles
  • Experienced local drivers
  • Fixed transparent pricing
Learn More

Scooty on Rent

Explore Dharamshala at your own pace! Rent a scooty and discover hidden cafes, viewpoints, and trails freely.

Starting ₹400/day

  • Well-maintained scooties
  • Helmet included
  • Valid DL required
Learn More

Bike on Rent

Royal Enfield Bullet, Honda CB, and other bikes available for adventure riders exploring the Himachal hills.

Starting ₹800/day

  • Royal Enfield & more
  • GPS tracker on bikes
  • 24-hr breakdown support
Learn More

Airport Pickup & Drop

On-time pickup and drop to/from Kangra-Gaggal Airport (DHM). Available 24/7 for all flight schedules.

Starting ₹600

  • Meet & greet service
  • Flight tracking
  • No extra night charges
Learn More
View All Services
Why Choose Us

Dharamshala's Most Trusted Taxi & Rental Service

We've been serving tourists and locals in Dharamshala for years. Our team of experienced local drivers knows every road, every shortcut, and every hidden gem — from the McLeod Ganj streets to the Triund trail base.

  • Transparent pricing — no hidden charges, ever
  • Well-maintained, clean, and comfortable vehicles
  • Local Dharamshala drivers who know the area
  • Instant booking via WhatsApp — no app needed
  • Available 24/7, especially for airport pickups
  • Serving Dharamshala, McLeod Ganj, Bhagsu & beyond

Customer Reviews

What Our Travellers Say

Real reviews from real customers who explored Dharamshala with us.

“Excellent taxi service! The driver was punctual, friendly, and knew all the best spots in Dharamshala. Took us to McLeod Ganj, Bhagsu, and Triund base. Highly recommended!”

“Rented a scooty for 3 days. The bike was in perfect condition and the price was very reasonable. Made our trip around Dharamshala super convenient and fun!”

“They picked us up from Kangra Airport at 5 AM without any issues. Driver was professional and the cab was clean and comfortable. Made a great first impression of Dharamshala!”

“Used their outstation taxi for a Dalhousie trip. Very affordable pricing, on-time pickup, and the driver was helpful with local knowledge. Will definitely use again!”
